description: Nurturing daycare center providing safe, creative, and enriching experiences for children ages 6 weeks to 5 years.

programs.name: Infant Care
programs.description: Gentle, responsive care tailored to each baby's unique needs. Our trained infant specialists focus on bonding, sensory exploration, and developmental milestones.

programs.name: Toddler Program
programs.description: Active exploration in a safe, stimulating environment. Toddlers build language, motor skills, and social confidence through guided and free play.

programs.name: Preschool
programs.description: Creative, play-based curriculum that sparks curiosity and builds school-readiness skills. Children learn through art, science, storytelling, and collaborative projects.

programs.name: Pre-K
programs.description: Comprehensive kindergarten preparation with structured learning, creative expression, and independence-building. Children graduate confident and ready to shine.

team.name: Ms. Angela Carter
team.bio: 15 years of experience leading childcare programs with a passion for creating nurturing learning environments.

team.name: Mr. David Chen
team.bio: Specializes in early bonding and developmental care with a calm, attentive approach that parents love.

team.name: Ms. Priya Sharma
team.bio: Brings creativity and energy to the classroom through art, music, and hands-on STEAM activities.

team.name: Ms. Jasmine Williams
team.bio: Focused on kindergarten readiness and building confidence through structured, supportive learning.

daily_schedule.description: Welcoming children with open-ended play stations and cozy reading corners.
Songs, calendar time, weather check, and setting daily intentions together.
Age-appropriate STEAM, literacy, and creative projects in small groups.
Healthy, nutritious snacks served family-style to build social skills.
Playground time, nature walks, and gross motor skill development.
Balanced meals with fresh ingredients. Allergy-friendly options available.
Restful environment with soft music and individual cots for each child.
Art, music, dramatic play, and sensory exploration.
Afternoon snack paired with interactive read-aloud sessions.
Open play time as families arrive. Daily reports shared with parents.
